# Voyager -- Complete Reference

> Voyager is an open-source (GPLv3) browser extension that adds timeline navigation, folder organization, prompt vault, chat export, and 20+ productivity features to Google Gemini and Google AI Studio. Works on Chrome, Edge, Firefox, Safari, Opera, and Brave.

## Project Overview

Voyager is designed as a comprehensive operating system layer for Google Gemini. It addresses the gap between Gemini's conversational AI capabilities and the organizational tools users need to manage long conversations, save prompts, export data, and navigate complex chat histories.

The extension is built with TypeScript and React, uses Manifest V3 for cross-browser compatibility, and stores all data locally in the browser using `chrome.storage`. Optional Google Drive sync is available for cross-device backup. Voyager collects no user data, has no analytics, and no third-party servers.

- **Version**: 1.4.3
- **License**: GPLv3
- **Author**: Jesse Zhang
- **Repository**: https://github.com/Nagi-ovo/gemini-voyager
- **Documentation**: https://voyager.nagi.fun
- **Languages**: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, French, Spanish, Portuguese, Russian, Arabic

## Installation

### Extension Stores (Recommended)

- **Chrome / Brave / Opera / Vivaldi**: Install from the [Chrome Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/voyager/iifacdnjakkhjjiengaffnegbndgingi)
- **Microsoft Edge**: Install from [Edge Add-ons](https://microsoftedge.microsoft.com/addons/detail/voyager/gibmkggjijalcjinbdhcpklodjkhhlne)
- **Firefox**: Install from [Firefox Add-ons](https://addons.mozilla.org/firefox/addon/gemini-voyager/)
- **Safari (macOS)**: Download the pre-signed `.dmg` from [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/Nagi-ovo/gemini-voyager/releases)

### Manual Installation (Latest Features)

1. Download the latest release from [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/Nagi-ovo/gemini-voyager/releases).
2. For Chrome/Edge: Unzip, open `chrome://extensions`, enable Developer Mode, click "Load unpacked."
3. For Firefox: Drag and drop the `.xpi` file into the Add-ons Manager.
4. For Safari: Open the `.dmg`, install the app, enable the extension in Safari Settings > Extensions.

## Supported Platforms

| Platform | Support Level |
|----------|--------------|
| Google Gemini (gemini.google.com) | Full -- all features |
| Google AI Studio (aistudio.google.com) | Partial -- folders, prompts, sidebar, formula copy |
| Gemini for Enterprise (business.gemini.google.com) | Prompt Manager only |

## Core Features

### Timeline Navigation

Voyager Timeline is a visual conversation navigation system for Google Gemini. It maps every message in a chat to an interactive node on the right side of the screen, turning long AI conversations into a navigable map.

**Capabilities**:
- Click any node to jump instantly to that message
- Hover a node to preview its content without scrolling
- Long-press a node to star (bookmark) it for later reference
- Right-click a node to set levels (1-3) or collapse children
- Drag the inner edge to resize the timeline width
- Vim-style keyboard shortcuts: `j`/`k` to navigate, `gg`/`GG` to jump to first/last turn
- All keyboard shortcuts are fully customizable
- Starred messages sync across devices via Cloud Sync

**When to use**: Conversations longer than 10 messages, research sessions, code debugging, brainstorming reviews, team handoffs.

**Availability**: Gemini only (not AI Studio). All browsers.

### Folder Organization

A drag-and-drop folder system for organizing Gemini conversations with nested hierarchy, custom colors, and AI-powered auto-organization.

**Capabilities**:
- Drag and drop conversations into folders
- Create nested folders (folders inside folders)
- Customize folder colors (7 defaults + custom color picker)
- Multi-select: long-press to enter multi-select mode, move multiple conversations at once
- Hide archived conversations from the sidebar (inbox-zero for AI chats)
- Account isolation: filter conversations by Google account
- AI Auto-Organize: one-click copies your conversation structure, paste into Gemini to generate a folder plan, then import the JSON result
- Folder as Project: set folder-level instructions that prepend to the first message in new chats (inspired by Claude Projects)
- Adjustable folder spacing (compact to spacious)
- Search conversations within folders

**AI Studio specific**: Sidebar width adjustment, Library integration (drag from Library into folders).

**Availability**: Both Gemini and AI Studio. All browsers.

### Prompt Vault (Prompt Library)

A personal repository for saving, organizing, and reusing prompts across any AI platform.

**Capabilities**:
- Save any prompt with one click from the floating Prompt Manager icon
- Organize prompts with tags (#coding, #email, #research)
- Search by keyword or tag
- One-click insertion into the conversation input
- Optional name labels for quick identification
- Compact list view (10+ prompts visible) and comfortable card view
- Fast hover preview (250ms) in compact mode
- Folder organization for prompts
- Works on custom websites: ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot, Poe, and any URL you configure

**Availability**: Both Gemini and AI Studio. Custom website support on all browsers.

### Chat Export

Export any Gemini conversation to Markdown, PDF, or JSON format.

**Format comparison**:
- **Markdown**: Best for note apps (Obsidian, Notion). Smallest file size. Preserves code blocks with syntax. Images embedded (except Safari).
- **PDF**: Best for sharing and printing. Largest file size. All images included. Beautifully formatted.
- **JSON**: Best for developers and data analysis. Raw data preserved. Re-importable. Programmatic access to conversation structure.

**How to export**: Hover the Gemini logo -> click the Export icon -> choose format.

**Deep Research export**: Voyager extracts the full research process including thinking steps, source links, and the final report from Gemini Deep Research sessions.

**Safari limitations**: Images cannot be extracted in Markdown (use PDF). PDF requires manual Command+P after clicking export.

**Availability**: Both Gemini and AI Studio. All browsers.

### Cloud Sync

Back up folders, prompt library, and starred messages to Google Drive.

**What syncs**: Folder structure (nesting, colors, assignments), prompt library (prompts, tags, folders), starred messages. Settings and conversation content are not synced.

**How it works**:
1. Sign in with Google and grant `drive.file` permission (most restrictive scope -- Voyager can only access files it created).
2. Click "Upload to Cloud" to sync local data to Google Drive.
3. Click "Download & Merge" on another device to intelligently merge cloud data with local data.
4. Sync is manual and on-demand -- no background sync.

**Privacy**: Data flows directly between your browser and Google Drive. No third-party servers. `drive.file` scope means Voyager cannot read any other file in your Drive.

**Availability**: Chrome, Edge, Firefox. Not available on Safari due to OAuth2 limitations.

### Formula Copy

One-click copy for mathematical formulas in LaTeX and MathML (Word-compatible) source codes. When Gemini renders a formula, Voyager adds copy buttons for both formats.

**Availability**: Both Gemini and AI Studio. All browsers.

## Gemini Exclusive Features

These features work only on Google Gemini (gemini.google.com), not on AI Studio.

### Quote Reply

Select any text in a conversation to quote it and reply with context. The selected text is automatically inserted as a quotation in your next message.

### Batch Delete

Select multiple conversations from the sidebar and delete them all at once. Enter multi-select mode, check the conversations you want to remove, and confirm.

### Deep Research Export

Extract research processes, thinking steps, and source links from Gemini Deep Research sessions. Export as Markdown or PDF with full metadata preserved.

### Mermaid Diagram Rendering

Render Mermaid diagram code blocks inline in conversations. Supports flowcharts, sequence diagrams, Gantt charts, pie charts, and other Mermaid diagram types.

### Markdown Rendering Fix

Fix Gemini's occasional Markdown rendering issues where code blocks, lists, or formatting break mid-conversation.

### NanoBanana (Watermark Removal)

Lossless watermark removal from Gemini-generated images. Removes the "Made with Google" watermark while preserving full image quality. Not available on Safari.

### Sidebar Auto-hide

The sidebar automatically collapses when your mouse leaves, giving you full-width focus on the conversation. Re-appears when you hover the left edge.

### Prevent Auto Scroll

Stop Gemini from automatically scrolling to the bottom when new content appears. Useful when you're reading earlier parts of a long response.

### Input Collapse

Collapse the input box when not in use to maximize the visible conversation area.

### Hide Recent Items and Gems

Hide the "Recent" section and Gem cards from the sidebar for a cleaner interface.

### Default Model

Auto-switch to your preferred Gemini model (e.g., Gemini 2.5 Pro) on every new chat. Stop manually selecting your model each time.

### Tab Title Sync

Automatically sync the browser tab title with the current conversation title. Know which chat you're in at a glance when you have multiple tabs open.

### Conversation Fork (Experimental)

Branch any conversation at any message node to explore different directions. Creates a divergent copy of the conversation from that point forward.

### Context Sync to IDE (Experimental)

Sync conversation context to your IDE for reference while coding.

### User Message LaTeX Rendering

Render LaTeX formulas in your own messages, not just in Gemini's responses.

### Message Timestamps

Auto-record when each message was sent. Trace your conversation timeline with precise timestamps.

### Send Behavior

Choose between Enter-to-send (default Gemini behavior) or Ctrl+Enter-to-send (Enter creates a newline). Take control of your input flow.

### Font Size Control

Adjust the chat font size for comfortable reading. Increase or decrease text size without affecting the rest of the Gemini interface.

### Visual Effects

Switch between snow, rain, and sakura petal visual effects from the extension popup. Decorative overlays for your chat interface.

## Privacy and Security

Voyager is designed with privacy as a core principle:

- **No data collection**: Voyager does not collect, transmit, or store any user data on external servers.
- **Local storage only**: All extension data (folders, prompts, settings) is stored in `chrome.storage.local` within your browser.
- **Optional cloud sync**: Google Drive sync uses OAuth2 with `drive.file` scope (can only access files Voyager created). Data goes directly to your Drive -- no intermediary servers.
- **No tracking**: No analytics, no telemetry, no usage tracking of any kind.
- **Minimal permissions**: The extension requests only the permissions needed to function on Gemini and AI Studio domains.
- **Open source**: Full source code is available on GitHub under GPLv3 for audit.
- **Privacy policy**: https://voyager.nagi.fun/en/privacy

## Browser Compatibility

| Browser | Status | Notes |
|---------|--------|-------|
| Chrome | Full support | Primary development target |
| Microsoft Edge | Full support | 50k+ users on Edge Add-ons |
| Firefox | Full support | Signed XPI for permanent installation |
| Safari (macOS) | Supported | No watermark removal, no image export (use PDF), no cloud sync |
| Opera | Full support | Install via Chrome Web Store |
| Brave | Full support | Install via Chrome Web Store |
| Vivaldi | Full support | Install via Chrome Web Store |

## Technical Details

- **Runtime**: Manifest V3 browser extension
- **Language**: TypeScript + React
- **Build tool**: Vite with Bun package manager
- **Testing**: Vitest with jsdom
- **Storage**: chrome.storage.local (primary), chrome.storage.sync (settings), chrome.storage.session (temporary)
- **Cloud sync**: Google Drive API with OAuth2 (drive.file scope)
- **Supported sites**: gemini.google.com, business.gemini.google.com, aistudio.google.com, aistudio.google.cn
